mapper.select:
select * from property_deals
deal_type = #{dealType} and lawd_cd = #{lawdCd} and umd_nm like concat('%', #{dong}, '%') and house_name like concat('%', #{houseName}, '%')
and deal_year = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 1, 4) as int) and deal_month = cast(substring(#{dealYmd}, 5, 2) as int)
order by deal_year desc, deal_month desc, deal_day desc, id desc limit 200
